findings.evidence: The PDF header text (title, location, date) is center-aligned. The HTML renders this section left-aligned and adds a horizontal dividing rule below the title.

findings.description: Tabular structure formalized and headers added.
findings.evidence: The PDF presents the schedule using tab spacing and dot leaders without explicit column headers. The HTML converts this into a formal table with borders and adds a header row ('Time', 'Topic', 'Speaker').
